name: abra
description: Repository maintenance scripts for Abra. The production runtime, CLI, and release image are Go.
author: Abra contributors

scripts.check:scripts: bash -n scripts/*.sh && node --check scripts/lib/eval-contracts.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/mcp.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/smoke-assertions.cjs && node --check scripts/lib/tier23-helpers.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-brain-benchmark.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-eval-contracts.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-install-test.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-oss-hygiene.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-maintainability-check.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-migration-check.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-npm-pack-check.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-tier1-eval.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-tier23-eval.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-golden-eval.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-provider-benchmark.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-perf-eval.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-dogfood-eval.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-queue-pressure-eval.mjs && node --check scripts/abra-release-gate.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check:scripts && npm run test:eval-contracts && npm run test:installer && npm run test:oss-hygiene && npm run test:maintainability && npm run test:migrations && npm run test:npm-pack && npm run check:oss
